mapper.select: SELECT noticeId, title, content, noticeType, isPinned, isPopup, popupStartDt, popupEndDt, targetDeptId, viewCount, attachYn, useYn, createdUser, createdDate, updateUser, updatedDate FROM notice_info WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_info (noticeId, title, content, noticeType, isPinned, isPopup, popupStartDt, popupEndDt, targetDeptId, attachYn, useYn, createdUser, updateUser) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{isPinned}, #{isPopup}, #{popupStartDt}, #{popupEndDt}, #{targetDeptId}, #{attachYn}, #{useYn}, #{createdUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_info SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, noticeType = #{noticeType}, isPinned = #{isPinned}, isPopup = #{isPopup}, popupStartDt = #{popupStartDt}, popupEndDt = #{popupEndDt}, targetDeptId = #{targetDeptId}, attachYn = #{attachYn}, useYn = #{useYn}, updateUser = #{updateUser}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice_info WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId}
SELECT CONCAT('NT', LPAD( COALESCE(CAST(SUBSTRING(MAX(noticeId), 3) AS UNSIGNED), 0) + 1, 7, '0' )) AS nextNoticeId FROM notice_info
